163 E0200A_PHYS_BHVRL_CD E0200A_PHYS_BHVRL_CD E0200A Behavior: Physical Behavioral Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident has physical behavioral symptoms directed toward others (e.g., hitting, kicking, pushing, scratching, grabbing, abusing others sexually). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Behavior not exhibited
1=Behavior of this type occured 1 to 3 days
2=Behavior of this type occurred 4 to 6 days, but less than
